@if (mode === EquipmentCreateEditMode.create) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.TITLE' | translate }} } @else { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_EDIT.TITLE' | translate }} }

@if (error) {
@if (mode === EquipmentCreateEditMode.create) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.ERROR' | translate }} } @else { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_EDIT.ERROR' | translate }} }
}
@if (hasError(equipmentModel, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.MODEL_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentModel, 'pattern')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.MODEL_NOT_BLANK' | translate }}
}
€
@if (hasError(equipmentPrice, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.PRICE_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentPrice, 'min')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.PRICE_MIN' | translate }}
}
@if (equipment.type === 'SKI' || equipment.type === 'POLE' || equipment.type === 'SNOWBOARD') {
@if (hasError(equipmentLength, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LENGTH_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentLength, 'min')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LENGTH_MIN' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentLength, 'max')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LENGTH_MAX' | translate }}
}
} @if (equipment.type === 'HELMET') {
@if (hasError(equipmentSize, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SIZE_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentSize, 'min')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SIZE_MIN' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentSize, 'max')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SIZE_MAX' | translate }}
}
} @if (equipment.type === 'SKIBOOT') {
@if (hasError(equipmentSoleLength, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SOLE_LENGTH_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentSoleLength, 'min')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SOLE_LENGTH_MIN' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentSoleLength, 'max')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SOLE_LENGTH_MAX' | translate }}
}
} @if (equipment.type === 'SNOWBOARDBOOT') {
}
@if (mode === EquipmentCreateEditMode.create) {
@if (hasError(equipmentCreationNumber, 'required')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.QUANTITY_REQUIRED' | translate }}
} @if (hasError(equipmentCreationNumber, 'min')) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.QUANTITY_MIN' | translate }}
}
}
